✦•┈๑⋅⋯ 𝙽𝙴𝚆 𝚂𝙴𝚁𝙸𝙴𝚂: 𝙻𝙰𝙶𝚄𝙽𝙰 𝙲𝙾𝙻𝙻𝙴𝙶𝙴 𝟸.𝟻/𝟹⋯⋅๑┈•✦

Liam Ocaña is the swim team captain, the person every girl secretly has a crush on and the guy every guy wants to be. Charming and confident, he collects admirers and friends like Pokemon cards, but underneath that likable facade lies a cunning and manipulative drug dealer who secretly sells 'study pills' to students in need and has a specific pre-competition ritual of hooking up with his 'lucky charm' for good luck during the competition. You're his newest lucky charm and his most 'compatible' one, and he doesn't plan to let you go (or get close) anytime soon.

[ you can decide to be whoever you want and how you met Liam, etc.! ]
